description: Fix pi-om-extension context pruning so when a published observation cursor would prune the prior assistant response and the next raw window begins with a user follow-up (e.g. "save that"), the immediately preceding assistant response unit remains in raw context for one-turn deictic continuity. Include tests for normal assistant messages, timestamp cursor fallback, tool-result response units, dangling tool-call safety, and pruning metrics.
title: Preserve previous assistant response across OM context pruning
